title: 📰 Bitcoin loses $77K as Hormuz oil shock and Fed jitters crush risk appetite
message: BTC fell ~3% below $77,000 Tuesday after twice failing $80K, dragging ETH and SOL down as oil topped $100.

title: 📰 SEC Chair Atkins unveils 'Project Crypto' at Bitcoin 2026, classifies most tokens as non-securities
message: Paul Atkins debuted a Commission-wide initiative at Bitcoin 2026 establishing a five-category token taxonomy that pulls most digital assets out of securities law.

title: 📰 Bitcoin stalls at $79.4K as Coinbase premium flips negative for first time since April 8
message: BTC's rally faded near $79,400 and slipped to ~$77K as US institutional demand cooled into the FOMC decision.

title: 📰 Western Union to launch Solana-powered USDPT stablecoin with Anchorage Digital
message: Remittance giant Western Union is pivoting to blockchain rails with USDPT, a Solana stablecoin issued by Anchorage Digital Bank.

title: 📰 BTC slides to $76.3K as UMich sentiment hits ATL 49.8, $281M longs liquidated pre-FOMC
message: Bitcoin failed at $80K and bled to $76,342 Tuesday as consumer sentiment crashed to a record low and traders unwound risk hours before the Fed.

title: 📰 FOMC verdict lands Wednesday with BTC pinned below $78K, futures market eyes 25bp cut
message: The Fed wraps its two-day meeting Wednesday with crypto traders de-risked and BTC stalling under $78,000 ahead of the rate call.

title: 📰 Aave-led coalition floats rescue plan for 116,500 unbacked rsETH from Kelp DAO exploit
message: DeFi United proposed using Aave to neutralize 116,500 unbacked rsETH and stabilize markets after the $292M KelpDAO bridge exploit.

title: 📰 SEC, CFTC unite at Bitcoin 2026 to tease Strategic Reserve and tokenization sandbox
message: U.S. regulators showed a unified front at Bitcoin 2026 in Las Vegas, signaling innovation exemptions and a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve announcement within weeks.

title: 📰 Four central banks set rates this week as BTC gets rejected below $80K
message: BOJ, Fed, ECB and BOE all decide policy this week, putting Bitcoin's stalled $80K breakout at the mercy of a synchronized macro print.

title: 📰 U Michigan sentiment craters to 49.8 ATL, inflation expectations spike to 4.8% — BTC stalls at $76.5K
message: Consumer confidence hit a record low and one-year inflation expectations jumped a full point, freezing Bitcoin's bid back to $80K.

title: 📰 BTC slides to $76.5K, ETH to $2,278 as four central banks line up rate decisions
message: Bitcoin gave back the $80K reclaim attempt as traders de-risk into a Fed, BOJ, ECB and BOE rate-decision week.

title: 📰 Aave-led DeFi rescue tops $300M as industry tries to plug Kelp DAO's $292M hole
message: Consensys, Lido, EtherFi and others have pledged into a $300M+ recovery vehicle to backstop Aave bad debt from the April 19 Kelp DAO exploit.

title: 📰 BTC slides under $77K, ETH below $2,300 ahead of Fed as $2.65T crypto market sheds 2.3%
message: Bitcoin pulled back to $76,472 and Ether to $2,278 as traders de-risked into Wednesday's FOMC, lopping 2.3% off total crypto market cap.

title: 📰 SEC's Atkins unveils tokenization sandbox as Lummis vows CLARITY Act push
message: U.S. regulators flashed a unified pro-crypto signal at Bitcoin 2026, with the SEC, CFTC and White House aligning on a tokenization framework.

title: 📰 Bitcoin loses $77K as Hormuz standoff lifts oil to 3-week high
message: Bitcoin slid below $77,000 and ether and Solana followed lower as the closed Strait of Hormuz pushed oil to its highest level in three weeks.

title: 📰 Bitcoin slips back to $78K as $80K wall holds before Wednesday's FOMC
message: Bitcoin pulled back from above $79,000 to trade near $78,100 as macro headwinds and a consumer sentiment crash keep bulls bottled up.

title: 📰 TOKEN2049 Dubai postponed to 2027 amid heightened UAE security risks
message: TOKEN2049 organizers delayed the flagship Dubai conference to 2027, citing escalating security risks across the UAE region.

title: 📰 BTC stalls at $80K wall as crypto market sheds 2.3% to $2.65T
message: Bitcoin failed a fourth attempt at $80,000 and slid to $77,005, pulling total crypto market cap down 2.3% to $2.65 trillion ahead of this week's Fed decision.

title: 📰 SEC's Atkins teases tokenization sandbox via 'innovation exemptions' window
message: SEC Chair Paul Atkins said the agency will launch innovation exemptions in the coming weeks, letting firms pilot on-chain tokenization and securitization under a regulated carve-out.

title: 📰 Bitcoin slips below $77K, ETH wobbles at $2,328 as traders eye Wednesday FOMC
message: BTC failed to hold the $80K wall and dropped under $77K with ETH at $2,328 as macro-cautious traders position into the Fed's April 29 decision.

title: 📰 April crypto hacks hit $606M in 18 days — worst month since Bybit's Feb 2025 breach
message: Crypto protocols have lost $606M to hacks in just the first 18 days of April, the worst monthly tally since Bybit's February 2025 breach.

title: 📰 BlackRock's IBIT logs record $983M daily inflow as BTC rejects $80K wall
message: IBIT pulled its biggest daily haul in six months even as bitcoin briefly tagged $79K and rolled back into range.

title: 📰 Kelp DAO drained for $292M as LayerZero bridge bug freezes Aave, Spark, Fluid
message: An attacker drained 116,500 rsETH (~$292M, 18% of supply) via Kelp DAO's LayerZero bridge, the largest DeFi exploit of 2026.

title: 📰 Bitcoin cracks $77K as 3% slide erases a full week of ETF-fueled gains
message: BTC slid nearly 3% to break below $77,000, wiping out the seven-day rally that briefly tagged the $80K wall.

title: 📰 April crypto hacks blow past $606M, worst month since Bybit's $1.4B breach
message: Crypto protocols have lost more than $606 million across 12 incidents in April, the worst monthly toll since Bybit's $1.4B hack in February 2025.

title: 📰 Four central banks decide rates this week, with FOMC the main event for crypto
message: Bank of Japan, Federal Reserve, ECB and Bank of England all set rate policy this week, with markets pricing zero Fed cuts.

title: 📰 April crypto hacks hit $606M, worst month since Feb 2025 as DeFi TVL bleeds $13B
message: April losses to crypto exploits topped $606M across 12 incidents, triggering a $13B DeFi TVL exodus in 48 hours.

title: 📰 Strategy stockpile hits 818,334 BTC at $62B cost basis, ~3.9% of supply
message: Saylor's Strategy now holds 818,334 BTC bought for nearly $62 billion at an average $75,537 per coin, the largest corporate stash ever.

title: 📰 FOMC week pins crypto: BTC stuck below $80K as traders price zero rate cuts
message: Bitcoin trades near $78K and Ether near $2,330 as the FOMC meeting becomes the week's defining macro catalyst with markets pricing no cut.

title: 📰 Bitcoin rejects $80K, slides under $78K as Iran peace headlines and oil weigh
message: BTC failed at $80,000 and dropped roughly 2% below $78,000 as caution dominated despite Iran offering a fresh war-ending proposal to Washington.
